race.comment: RAINBOW CHARLIE (5) made his debut as an easing favourite with a game on-pace third over 900m at Newcastle in the heavy conditions. Key jockey change from the inside gate and can put these away on the improving surface. IAMBUBB (7) even return as the equal favourite when he held a forward position to run fourth over 900m at Newcastle. Penza sticks and he should appreciate the extra trip. Has further upside and genuine winning claims. PAZYRYK (8) resumes after bumping into some handy types last time in. Gripped on late with an even fifth over 1200m at Kembla Grange last February. Has trialled well leading into this and the winkers come off. No surprise to see her take this out. MAGIC BLAZE (1) Kermadec gelding from Masai Magic on debut for the Jim & Greg Lee yard. Primed for this with the two good trials and keep safe from the good gate.
